Frost Shards Amulet

Whenever any unit on the battlefield dies, the unit casts restoration on the ally with the least current health. It removes a random debuff and restores 80000 health. It also increases their damage by 50% and health by 25% and reduces incoming damage by 30% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Sage bot code: AM132
